title: Volkswagen Group Makes Strategic Investment into XPENG to Develop B-Class EVs in China
text: Volkswagen Group announced a strategic investment into XPENG to develop B-Class electric vehicles in China. The investment positions both companies for collaborative product development and technology integration. Volkswagen acquired approximately 4.99% of XPENG's outstanding share capital for around US$700 million, signaling strong confidence in the company's technological capabilities and market position. The partnership enables XPeng's E/E Architecture to be adopted across Volkswagen's full range of platforms, including electric, hybrid, and internal combustion vehicles in China. The collaboration extends to the joint development of the ID. UNYX 08 full-size electric SUV, integrating XPeng's autonomous driving system and Turing AI chips into Volkswagen's EV platform. Plans include rolling out more than 20 new models through the partnership, establishing a significant competitive advantage for both companies.
